title: BloodyPack
description: Bloody Texture Pack with custom models
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21801f57a1592db68f9e49786129998e2f60f8b1.png)
**Pack Version** (Last)**:** v2.1

**Created by:** 
> Me ( [@GalacticUniv](https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R) )

**Available in the following versions:**
> 1.16 - 1.20.1 | 1.20.2+

**Tags**: 
> Custom, Black, Red, 32x, Blood, Models, Book, Eye

**Description:**
> Bloody Pack is another one of my experimental texture packs. This time, I explored the idea of how Minecraft items would look if they were cursed with "blood magic"—basically black with blood streaks on top.

> I also experimented with item models, giving the Netherite sword and the totem completely unique designs. The sword is now a scythe, and the totem is a demonic book with an eye. What could these eerie transformations mean? I’ll leave that for you to figure out. ;)

> Don't forget that downloading the texture pack from the official sources (In PlanetMinecraft) is a huge way to support us! <3

> If you have any questions or want to report a bug, feel free to do so through our official Discord:
> <https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R>

> You can also follow us on social media! :D
> <https://solo.to/galacticuniv>
